# Real mksquashfs output (squashfs-tools 4.7.5), captured 2026-05-30 over a pipe --
# the production path used by CommandRunner.run_streaming. Over a pipe mksquashfs
# prints ONLY the final bar frame (the live redraw is tty-gated), then emits closing
# statistics whose percentages are NOT progress. squashfs_progress must read only the
# bracketed bar (-> 1.0) and ignore the statistics, else the bar jumps backwards.
[=============================================================\] 2155/2155 100%
	100.00% of uncompressed filesystem size (65539.02 Kbytes)
	6.71% of uncompressed inode table size (2594 bytes)
	74.59% of uncompressed directory table size (244 bytes)
